author: VixDreamer
title: Kontext ControlNet Fix
description: Runtime patch that fixes the shape-mismatch crash (RuntimeError on tensor dimension 1) when combining Flux Kontext ReferenceLatent with any ControlNet node. Monkey-patches Flux.forward_orig without touching core files. Idempotent — skips patching if the upstream fix (PR #9180) is already present.
